query:
SELECT 
  pc.id,
  pc.partnerId,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus,
  LENGTH(pc.contractStatus) as status_length,
  HEX(pc.contractStatus) as status_hex
FROM partner_cities pc
JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.phone = '15321700153';
